addons.releaseNotes: v1.3.4: Sidebar icon now uses an inline lucide Sparkles SVG (h-5 w-5, stroke 2) so it visually matches the rest of the menu — was rendering as a small emoji 📄 before. Bundles v1.3.3's smaller chunks + 90s timeout, v1.3.2's model-ID fixes, and v1.3.1's pdfjs-dist 4.x downgrade.

addons.name: TR PDF Converter
addons.description: Native Trade Republic PDF parser — extracts cash, MMF, trading P&L. Direct one-click import to Donkeyfolio activities (auto-creates TR account, extracts quantity + unit price + €1 fee for manual trades, €0 for savings plans). Cash flows (DEPOSIT/WITHDRAWAL/INTEREST/DIVIDEND) emit qty=1, unitPrice=amount per Donkeyfolio wizard convention. Supports Buy/Sell/Savings plan (DCA) trades. Format-aware number parsing (US & EU). Auto-recovery for broken rows. Ported from jcmpagel's open-source code.
addons.author: Donkeyfolio
addons.releaseNotes: v2.4.3: Non-trade cash activities (DEPOSIT/WITHDRAWAL/INTEREST/DIVIDEND/FEE/TAX) now emit quantity=1 and unitPrice=amount instead of qty=0/price=0. The Donkeyfolio import wizard treats quantity as a required field, so the previous zeros caused those rows to be rejected silently. Bundles v2.4.2's TR fee model (€1/€0), v2.4.1's critical 100x amount fix, and all earlier wins.
